channel.title: daily on My Notebook
channel.description: Recent content in daily on My Notebook

item.title: 1 January 2021
item.description: Starting a new blog today to chronicle my progress in getting up to speed on machine learning. I am not new to ML and I am already very familiar with many libraries, tools, and even some of the maths behind it, but a refresher on some of the basics would still be useful. Had to update my website to add a new blog section, and some templates to make the blog work, including the section list and the navigation bar.
